description: Normalize the biased judge scores from the pie competition using z-score standardization to create fair rankings. Save the normalized results to /home/ga/Documents/normalized_rankings.csv.

natural_language.prompt: A pie competition has judges with very different scoring styles. Judge 2 is harsh (scores 4-6), Judge 4 is generous (scores 9-10). Normalize the scores using z-scores so rankings are fair, then identify the top 3 winners.
